nodes.name: Black-headed nightingale-thrush
nodes.summary: Black-headed nightingale-thrush（Black-headed nightingale-thrush，学名 Catharus mexicanus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。
locations: 伊達爾戈縣 (德克薩斯州)

links.target: loc-伊達爾戈縣-德克薩斯州-2602a361
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: mexicanus spent much of 2004 in Hidalgo County, Texas. The black-headed nightingale-thrush primarily inhabits lowland and montane evergreen forest in the tropical and subtropical zones. In Guatemala and Honduras it also occurs in pine-oak forest. Sources differ on its overall elevational range
